const varName = tagMap[msg.topic];
if (!varName) return null;

const p = msg.payload;
let v = null;
if (p !== null && p !== undefined && typeof p === 'object') {
  v = p.value !== undefined ? p.value
    : p.content !== undefined ? p.content : null;
} else if (typeof p === 'number' || typeof p === 'boolean') {
  v = p;
}
if (v !== null) flow.set(varName, parseFloat(v));
return null;
